---
title: "test_ui.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_ui.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 4.28
---

## Intent
The `test_ui.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_stream, reset_hud_async_state, test_hud_async_tearing, daemon_flood, test_hud_interruption_cleanup. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_stream, reset_hud_async_state, test_hud_async_tearing, daemon_flood, test_hud_interruption_cleanup. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [io](file://io)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `mock_stream`
- `reset_hud_async_state`
- `test_hud_async_tearing`
- `daemon_flood`
- `test_hud_interruption_cleanup`
